prestazioni: Crank the 4.0L TFSI V8 (engine code: **CWUB**) to 800 HP and 850 Nm via a **Weistec Engineering Stage 3+ Hybrid Turbo System** (utilizing **Garrett GTX5533R Gen II** turbos with billet compressor wheels, 76mm inducers, and custom Weistec titanium turbine housings), paired with a **034 Motorsport High-Flow Fuel System** (dual **Bosch Motorsport 450 LPH** pumps, **Injector Dynamics ID1700x** injectors, and a **Syvecs S8 Plug & Play ECU** with flex-fuel ethanol mapping)

Replace the stock ZF 8HP90 transmission with a **Weistec Engineering TH8A 8-Speed Automatic** (reinforced billet valve body, upgraded clutches with **Raybestos Stage 3 friction discs**, and a **South Bend dual-disc clutch** for launch control), mated to a **Quattro GmbH RS7-specific limited-slip differential** with **Wavetrac helical gearing** and 70% lockup under load

Install a **034 Motorsport C7.5 RS7-specific Hybrid Intercooler System** (bar-and-plate core with **GReddy Type-RS silicone couplers** and **Tial 50mm BOV**), paired with a **Forge Motorsport catch can system** (dual **AN-10** lines with **Mishimoto baffled reservoirs**) to eliminate boost-induced oil vapor ingestion
estetica: Fit a **Liberty Walk LB Works RS7 Widebody Kit** (carbon fiber fenders with **15mm extended wheel arches**, custom **Vorsteiner V-FF107** forged wheels in **21x10.5 ET35 front / 21x12.5 ET45 rear**, and **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R** tires in **295/30/21 and 325/30/21** sizes)

Replace the stock exhaust with a **REMUS RS7 Performance Titanium Valved Exhaust** (dual **102mm outlets**, **Inconel 625 headers**, and **REMUS X-Pipe** with **HJS 200-cell catalytic converters** for Euro 6 compliance), paired with a **Vorschlag Design RS7-specific carbon fiber diffuser** and **Akrapović titanium exhaust tips**

Install a **Rocket Bunny V3 RS7 Aero Kit** (carbon fiber front lip with **DTM-style dive planes**, **custom GT3-style rear wing** with **adjustable Gurney flaps**, and **carbon fiber side skirts** with integrated **LED turn signals**), finished in **Audi Nardo Grey (LZ7Z) with matte PPF wrap** and **3M Ceramic Tint (70% VLT front, 20% rear)**
